# Sorin Raduta

> Software engineer who builds systems that scale, using AI to move faster without cutting corners.

This site is an interactive 3D office. It has no traditional sub-pages — everything below lives on the single page at https://sorinraduta.ro/, split across clickable objects in the scene (a laptop for contact, a clipboard for bio, folders for projects, a clock for credits).

## About

Sorin Raduta is a software engineer focused on designing systems that hold up under real-world scale, using AI tools to build them faster without cutting corners on quality. Currently open to work.

Core skills: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, system design, and applying AI/LLM tooling to software engineering workflows.

## Projects

- Sepolia Faucet Automation — automated Sepolia testnet ETH faucet requests: https://github.com/sorinraduta/sepolia-faucet-automation
- Matrix Patterns — formulas for building matrix patterns: https://github.com/sorinraduta/Matrix-patterns

## Contact & links

- Email: sorinradutaa@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/sorinraduta
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sorinraduta/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/sorinraduta
- Contact form: https://sorinraduta.ro/ (click the laptop in the 3D scene)
